allow: Bash(python -c "import json; zh=json.load\(open\(''Translation.zh.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); hant=json.load\(open\(''Translation.zh-Hant.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(f''zh: {len\(zh\)} keys, zh-Hant: {len\(hant\)} keys''\); missing=[k for k in zh if k not in hant]; print\(f''Missing in zh-Hant: {len\(missing\)} keys''\)")
